channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Millions of homes in the U.S. are uninsured. NPR wants to hear your story
item.description: Millions of homes in the U.S. are uninsured, partly because insurance costs have soared in recent years. NPR wants to hear about the coverage decision...

item.title: WHCA dinner shooter charged. And, Charles III to address Congress
item.description: Cole Allen, the man who tried to storm the White House Correspondents' Dinner, is being charged with trying to assassinate President Trump. And, King ...

item.title: Deadlock over Iran's nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz cripples peace efforts
item.description: Two months after the U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran started the war, peace talks are on hold, with control of the Strait of Hormuz and the future of Iran...

item.title: 'We don't know what will happen to us': U.S. deportees in limbo in DRC
item.description: 15 South American migrants and asylum seekers deported from the U.S. to the DRC are now living in uncertainty in a country an with ongoing armed confl...
